test_name: BPlusTree insert produces new root copy-on-write
expected_failure_reason: assertNotSame(oldRoot, newRoot) will fail because current implementation mutates root in place (tree.root is reassigned but oldRoot reference points to same mutated LeafNode that became an InternalNode). Also oldRootKeysAfter will show [1,2,3,4] instead of [1,2,3] because LeafNode.insertAt mutates the array in place.
